introSection: Jimmy Neutron's Atomic Flyer is a steel suspended roller coaster at Movie Park Germany in Bottrop, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. Opened in March 2007, the ride's theme is based on the Nickelodeon show The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Jimmy Neutron's Atomic Flyer follows Vekoma's 294m Suspended Family Coaster layout. It is one of two built, the other one being Steel Lasso at Frontier City in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma.

fullText:
Jimmy Neutron's Atomic Flyer is a steel suspended roller coaster at Movie Park Germany in Bottrop, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. Opened in March 2007, the ride's theme is based on the Nickelodeon show The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius.

Jimmy Neutron's Atomic Flyer follows Vekoma's 294m Suspended Family Coaster layout. It is one of two built, the other one being Steel Lasso at Frontier City in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma.
